parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_name: $json.business_name, website_url: $json.website_url, location: $json.location, email: $json.email, name: $json.name, phone: $json.phone, trade: $json.trade }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $('Validate').item.json.email, updateEnabled: true, attributes: { FIRSTNAME: $('Validate').item.json.name, PHONE: $('Validate').item.json.phone, BUSINESS_NAME: $json.business_name, DOMAIN: $json.domain, TOWN: $json.town, TRADE: $json.trade, VISIBILITY_SCORE: $json.visibility_score, MENTION_RATE: $json.mention_rate, TOP_COMPETITOR: $json.top_competitor, SCAN_DATE: $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }, listIds: [ Number($env.BREVO_LIST_ID) ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.BREVO_FROM_EMAIL, name: $env.BREVO_FROM_NAME }, to: [{ email: $('Validate').item.json.email, name: $('Validate').item.json.name }], subject: 'Your AI visibility result: ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.business_name, htmlContent: '

Hi ' + ($('Validate').item.json.name || 'there') + ',

Your AI Visibility Check is attached. You scored ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.visibility_score + '/100. ' + ($('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.headline || '') + '

Want the full picture? The GEO Audit is £247 with a prioritised fix list. Reply to this email or book at antekautomation.com/services/geo-audit.

Antek Automation · Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover SP10 1LZ · 0333 038 9960

', attachment: [{ content: $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.pdf_b64, name: 'ai-visibility-check.pdf' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, text: 'New visibility check: ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.business_name + ' (' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.town + ') scored ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.visibility_score + '/100. Mentioned on ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.platforms_mentioned + '/' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.platforms_tested + ' engines. Top competitor: ' + ($('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.top_competitor || 'none') + '. Email: ' + $('Validate').item.json.email }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.BREVO_FROM_EMAIL, name: $env.BREVO_FROM_NAME }, to: [{ email: $('Validate').item.json.email, name: $('Validate').item.json.name }], subject: 'Your AI visibility check is on its way', htmlContent: '

Hi ' + ($('Validate').item.json.name || 'there') + ',

Your check is taking a little longer than expected. We will send your report shortly.

Antek Automation · 0333 038 9960

' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.BREVO_FROM_EMAIL, name: $env.BREVO_FROM_NAME }, to: [{ email: $env.OPERATOR_EMAIL, name: 'Antek Ops' }], subject: '[INTERNAL] AI Visibility — ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.business_name + ' (' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.visibility_score + '/100)', htmlContent: '

Operator report attached for ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.business_name + '. Score ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.visibility_score + '/100 · mentioned on ' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.platforms_mentioned + '/' + $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.platforms_tested + ' engines.

Lead: ' + $('Validate').item.json.name + ' — ' + $('Validate').item.json.email + ' — ' + $('Validate').item.json.phone + '

', attachment: [{ content: $('Scan (geo-scan)').item.json.operator_pdf_b64, name: 'operator-report.pdf' }] }) }}
